title: Resistance Clashes Kill 17 SAC Troops in Kani (Sagaing) and Natmauk (Magway)
detail: Resistance forces conducted multiple engagements in Kani Township (Sagaing Region) and Natmauk Township (Magway Region) on April 5, with resistance claims of 17 junta troops killed across the two fronts. Kani Township is a PDF stronghold in southern Sagaing Region where the resistance has maintained sustained pressure on SAC supply convoys and forward bases. Natmauk Township in central Magway has seen escalating PDF operations as resistance forces push to expand territorial control beyond their Sagaing heartland. Casualty figures come from resistance sources and should be treated as unverified pending independent confirmation.
